NORWEGIAN SEA.
NORWAY.
DNC 22.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING
   0700Z TO 1200Z DAILY 04 THRU 19 DEC IN AREAS:
   A. BOUND BY
      69-17.6N 016-01.0E, 69-24.0N 015-51.0E,
      69-50.0N 015-46.0E, 69-50.0N 016-10.0E,
      69-24.0N 016-10.0E.
   B. WITHIN 30 MILES OF 74-10.0N 015-50.0E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 191300Z DEC 18.
